steps.title: Check corresponding angles
steps.content: In similar triangles, corresponding angles are congruent. Since $J$ corresponds to $M$ and angle $J$ measures $34^\circ$, angle $M$ must also measure $34^\circ$. Statement I must be true.

steps.title: Check corresponding sides
steps.content: Corresponding side lengths in similar triangles are proportional, but they are not necessarily equal. Since the scale factor is unknown, $MN$ does not have to equal $7$. Statement II is not guaranteed.

steps.title: Select the true statements
steps.content: Only Statement I must be true. The answer is A.
